main.description: Mint a fresh did:plc for a new community. Contrail generates three P-256 keypairs (signing, contrail rotation, creator rotation), submits a genesis op to the PLC directory, and stores the signing + contrail-rotation keys encrypted. The creator's rotation key is returned once as a recovery secret and never stored.

handle.description: Optional handle to include in alsoKnownAs (as at://<handle>).

pdsEndpoint.description: Optional PDS endpoint to include as the atproto_pds service.

recoveryKey.description: Creator's rotation key as a private JWK. Shown once — cannot be retrieved later.
